description: Composition Green ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck with a yoke that has sequin work and lace border, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian prints and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The yoke with its sequin and lace detailing adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
